name: sparks-core
description: Multi-module monorepo of pipeline libraries for sparkwing - each module versioned independently
author: sparkwing

modules.description: Shared step-banner + error-wrapped shell helpers used across the other modules
AWS profile-flag resolution and IRSA detection
Docker build, push, multi-registry tagging, ECR auth, registry detection
S3 static-site deployment with cache-header conventions
GitOps deployment with kustomize patching, retry, and ArgoCD sync
Deploy orchestrator: routes to gitops+ArgoCD (cluster) or kubectl (local)
Pre-commit checks: formatting, linting, trailing newlines
HTTP health probes for post-deploy verification; Check feeds sparkwing Job.Verify, with unhealthy-vs-indeterminate classification
High-level pipeline primitives: DockerDeploy, StaticDeploy, NextJSBuild
Curated pipeline template registry: deterministic starters consumed by sparkwing pipeline new --template
